front: Musical: This character is repeatedly perplexed at mentions of 'what happened in Secaucus'
Musical: This character's aunt Debra lived in a library after a coyote set fire to her tent; she later drags a USPS collection box down the stairs
Musical: This character's love interest brainstorms anagrams of her name, landing on one that gives the show its title
Musical: This character asks for a monkey and a treehouse in a number framed as a letter to the Make-A-Wish Foundation
Musical: In this show's number 'Better,' the title character has a birthday party at Skater Planet
Musical: Victoria Clark won a Tony for playing this rapidly-aging teenager in a Jeanine Tesori musical that won the 2023 Tony for Best Musical
Musical: Jeanine Tesori composed the music for this 2023 Tony-winning show about a rapidly-aging teenager, collaborating with David Lindsay-Abaire
